original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT "DEPTNO", "NAME" FROM "DEPT" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP") AS "t4" WHERE "DEPTNO" = "t4"."DEPTNO") ORDER BY "DEPTNO") AS "t3" ORDER BY "DEPTNO" OFFSET 2 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
rewritten_query:
SELECT "DEPTNO", "NAME"
FROM "DEPT"
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "EMP" WHERE "DEPT"."DEPTNO" = "EMP"."DEPTNO")
ORDER BY "DEPTNO"
OFFSET 2 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Removed unnecessary nested subquery in the EXISTS clause by directly referencing the EMP table
Eliminated redundant outer query and duplicate ORDER BY clause
